web.title: search offers - Vast.ai Documentation – Affordable GPU Cloud ...
web.description: Search for available GPU machine offers with advanced filtering and sorting. Each filter parameter (such as verified, gpu_name, num_gpus, etc.)
web.markdown:

search offers

cURL

Copy

Ask AI

```
curl --request POST \
  --url https://console.vast.ai/api/v0/bundles/ \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer <token>' \
  --header 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  --data '
{
  "limit": 100,
  "type": "on-demand",
  "verified": {
    "eq": true
  },
  "rentable": {
    "eq": true
  },
  "rented": {
    "eq": false
  }
}
'
```

200

400

404

#### Authorizations

[​](https://docs.vast.ai/api-reference/search/search-offers#authorization-authorization)

Authorization

string

header

required

API key must be provided in the Authorization header

#### Body

application/json

[​](https://docs.vast.ai/api-reference/search/search-offers#body-limit)

limit

integer

Max offers to return

[​](https://docs.vast.ai/api-reference/search/search-offers#body-type)

type

enum<string>

Instance type for the offer. Affects pricing calculation.

- ondemand: Fixed pricing based on listed rates. Default.
- bid (interruptible): Uses minimum bid price. Lower cost but may be interrupted if outbid.
- reserved: Reserved instance pricing.

Available options:

`ondemand`,

`bid`,

`reserved`

[​](https://docs.vast.ai/api-reference/search/search-offers#body-verified)

verified

object

Machine verification status

Showchild attributes

[​](https://docs.vast.ai/api-reference/search/search-offers#body-rentable)

rentable

object

Whether machine is rentable

Showchild attributes

[​](https://docs.vast.ai/api-reference/search/search-offers#body-rented)

rented

object

When set to true, include offers where the calling user already has rented GPUs.
This is useful for finding offers on machines you're already renting.

Showchild attributes

[​](https://docs.vast.ai/api-reference/search/search-offers#body-gpu-name)

gpu\_name

object

GPU model name. Example: {"eq": "RTX\_4090"} or {"in": \["RTX\_3090", "RTX\_4090"\]}

Showchild attributes

[​](https://docs.vast.ai/api-reference/search/search-offers#body-reliability)

reliability

object

Machine reliability score (0-1). Example: {"gte": 0.99}

[​](https://docs.vast.ai/api-reference/search/search-offers#body-num-gpus)

num\_gpus

object

Number of GPUs. Example: {"gte": 4} or {"in": \[1, 2, 4, 8\]}

Showchild attributes

[​](https://docs.vast.ai/api-reference/search/search-offers#body-gpu-ram)

gpu\_ram

object

GPU RAM in MB. Example: {"gte": 24000}

[​](https://docs.vast.ai/api-reference/search/search-offers#body-duration)

duration

object

Minimum required rental duration in seconds (the offer must be available for at least this long from now).

[​](https://docs.vast.ai/api-reference/search/search-offers#body-machine-id)

machine\_id

object

Filter by specific host machine ID

[​](https://docs.vast.ai/api-reference/search/search-offers#body-dlperf-per-dphtotal)

dlperf\_per\_dphtotal

object

DLPerf per dollar per hour

[​](https://docs.vast.ai/api-reference/search/search-offers#body-dph-total)

dph\_total

object

Total $/hour rental cost. Example: {"lte": 0.5}

[​](https://docs.vast.ai/api-reference/search/search-offers#body-flops-per-dphtotal)

flops\_per\_dphtotal

object

TFLOPs per $/hour

[​](https://docs.vast.ai/api-reference/search/search-offers#body-geolocation)

geolocation

object

Machine location (two letter country code). Example: {"in": \["US", "CA"\]}

Showchild attributes

[​](https://docs.vast.ai/api-reference/search/search-offers#body-gpu-arch)

gpu\_arch

object

Host machine GPU architecture (e.g. nvidia, amd). Example: {"eq": "nvidia"}

[​](https://docs.vast.ai/api-reference/search/search-offers#body-dlperf)

dlperf

object

Deep Learning performance score

[​](https://docs.vast.ai/api-reference/search/search-offers#body-cuda-max-good)

cuda\_max\_good

object

Maximum supported CUDA version

[​](https://docs.vast.ai/api-reference/search/search-offers#body-inet-down)

inet\_down

object

Download bandwidth (MB/s)

[​](https://docs.vast.ai/api-reference/search/search-offers#body-inet-up)

inet\_up

object

Upload bandwidth (MB/s)

[​](https://docs.vast.ai/api-reference/search/search-offers#body-inet-down-cost)

inet\_down\_cost

object

Download bandwidth cost ($/GB)

[​](https://docs.vast.ai/api-reference/search/search-offers#body-inet-up-cost)

inet\_up\_cost

object

Upload bandwidth cost ($/GB)

[​](https://docs.vast.ai/api-reference/search/search-offers#body-driver-version)

driver\_version

object

NVIDIA driver version in the format "XXX.XX.XX"

[​](https://docs.vast.ai/api-reference/search/search-offers#body-compute-cap)

compute\_cap

object

CUDA compute capability x 100. Use 650 for compute capability 6.5 or 700 for 7.0.

[​](https://docs.vast.ai/api-reference/search/search-offers#body-cpu-arch)

cpu\_arch

object

Host machine CPU architecture (Default is amd64). Example: {"eq": "amd64"}

[​](https://docs.vast.ai/api-reference/search/search-offers#body-has-avx)

has\_avx

object

CPU supports AVX instruction set

[​](https://docs.vast.ai/api-reference/search/search-offers#body-cpu-cores)

cpu\_cores

object

Number of virtual CPUs

[​](https://docs.vast.ai/api-reference/search/search-offers#body-cpu-cores-effective)

cpu\_cores\_effective

object

Effective vCPU count for the offer

[​](https://docs.vast.ai/api-reference/search/search-offers#body-cpu-ghz)

cpu\_ghz

object

CPU clock speed in GHz

[​](https://docs.vast.ai/api-reference/search/search-offers#body-cpu-ram)

cpu\_ram

object

CPU RAM in MB

[​](https://docs.vast.ai/api-reference/search/search-offers#body-datacenter)

datacenter

object

Show only datacenter offers

[​](https://docs.vast.ai/api-reference/search/search-offers#body-external)

external

object

Show external offers in addition to datacenter offers

[​](https://docs.vast.ai/api-reference/search/search-offers#body-disk-bw)

disk\_bw

object

Disk read bandwidth in MB/s

[​](https://docs.vast.ai/api-reference/search/search-offers#body-disk-space)

disk\_space

object

Disk storage space in GB

[​](https://docs.vast.ai/api-reference/search/search-offers#body-bw-nvlink)

bw\_nvlink

object

NVLink interconnect bandwidth in GB/s. Use when filtering for multi-GPU systems with high-speed NVLink.

[​](https://docs.vast.ai/api-reference/search/search-offers#body-gpu-max-power)

gpu\_max\_power

object

GPU power limit in watts

[​](https://docs.vast.ai/api-reference/search/search-offers#body-gpu-max-temp)

gpu\_max\_temp

object

GPU temperature limit in Celsius

[​](https://docs.vast.ai/api-reference/search/search-offers#body-gpu-mem-bw)

gpu\_mem\_bw

object

GPU memory bandwidth in GB/s

[​](https://docs.vast.ai/api-reference/search/search-offers#body-gpu-total-ram)

gpu\_total\_ram

object

Total GPU RAM across all GPUs in MB

[​](https://docs.vast.ai/api-reference/search/search-offers#body-gpu-frac)

gpu\_frac

object

Fraction of the total GPU resources being offered

[​](https://docs.vast.ai/api-reference/search/search-offers#body-gpu-display-active)

gpu\_display\_active

object

Whether the GPU has an attached display

[​](https://docs.vast.ai/api-reference/search/search-offers#body-direct-port-count)

direct\_port\_count

object

Number of direct ports

[​](https://docs.vast.ai/api-reference/search/search-offers#body-host-id)

host\_id

object

Host user ID

[​](https://docs.vast.ai/api-reference/search/search-offers#body-id)

id

object

Offer ID

[​](https://docs.vast.ai/api-reference/search/search-offers#body-min-bid)

min\_bid

object

Minimum bid price ($/hour)

[​](https://docs.vast.ai/api-reference/search/search-offers#body-mobo-name)

mobo\_name

object

Motherboard name

[​](https://docs.vast.ai/api-reference/search/search-offers#body-pci-gen)

pci\_gen

object

PCIe generation

[​](https://docs.vast.ai/api-reference/search/search-offers#body-pcie-bw)

pcie\_bw

object

PCIe bandwidth (CPU to GPU)

[​](https://docs.vast.ai/api-reference/search/search-offers#body-storage-cost)

storage\_cost

object

Storage cost in $/GB/month

[​](https://docs.vast.ai/api-reference/search/search-offers#body-static-ip)

static\_ip

object

Whether the IP address is static/stable

[​](https://docs.vast.ai/api-reference/search/search-offers#body-total-flops)

total\_flops

object

Total theoretical GPU compute performance (TFLOPs) across all GPUs.

[​](https://docs.vast.ai/api-reference/search/search-offers#body-os-version)

os\_version

object

Host machine Ubuntu OS version

[​](https://docs.vast.ai/api-reference/search/search-offers#body-ubuntu-version)

ubuntu\_version

object

Host machine Ubuntu OS version (alias for os\_version)

[​](https://docs.vast.ai/api-reference/search/search-offers#body-verification)

verification

object

Machine verification status string (verified, deverified, unverified). Example: {"eq": "verified"}

[​](https://docs.vast.ai/api-reference/search/search-offers#body-vms-enabled)

vms\_enabled

object

Whether the machine is a VM instance

[​](https://docs.vast.ai/api-reference/search/search-offers#body-order)

order

string\[\]\[\]

Sort fields and directions

Required array length: `2` elements

[​](https://docs.vast.ai/api-reference/search/search-offers#body-disable-bundling)

disable\_bundling

boolean

Disable offer bundling

[​](https://docs.vast.ai/api-reference/search/search-offers#body-allocated-storage)

allocated\_storage

number

Storage allocation size in GB for the instance.
This sets the disk size when creating the instance and cannot be changed later.
Default is 8GB.

#### Response

200

application/json

Successful search response

[​](https://docs.vast.ai/api-reference/search/search-offers#response-offers)

offers

object\[\]

[Suggest edits](https://github.com/vast-ai/docs/edit/main/api-reference/search/search-offers.mdx) [Raise issue](https://github.com/vast-ai/docs/issues/new?title=Issue%20on%20docs&body=Path:%20/api-reference/search/search-offers)

[search benchmarks](https://docs.vast.ai/api-reference/search/search-benchmarks) [edit template](https://docs.vast.ai/api-reference/templates/edit-template)

Ctrl+I

Assistant

Responses are generated using AI and may contain mistakes.

metadata.og:description: Search for available GPU machine offers with advanced filtering and sorting. Each filter parameter (such as verified, gpu_name, num_gpus, etc.) should be an object specifying the operator and value you want to match. Filter operators: | Operator | Meaning | Example | |:---------|:-----------------------|:-------------------------------| | eq | Equal to | { "eq": true } | | neq | Not equal to | { "neq": false } | | gt | Greater than | { "gt": 0.99 } | | lt | Less than | { "lt": 10000 } | | gte | Greater than or equal | { "gte": 4 } | | lte | Less than or equal | { "lte": 8 } | | in | Value is in a list | { "in": ["RTX_3090", "RTX_4090"] } | | notin | Value is not in a list | { "notin": ["TW", "SE"] } | CLI Usage: vastai search offers 'reliability > 0.99 num_gpus>=4' --order=dph_total
metadata.ogDescription: Search for available GPU machine offers with advanced filtering and sorting. Each filter parameter (such as verified, gpu_name, num_gpus, etc.) should be an object specifying the operator and value you want to match. Filter operators: | Operator | Meaning | Example | |:---------|:-----------------------|:-------------------------------| | eq | Equal to | { "eq": true } | | neq | Not equal to | { "neq": false } | | gt | Greater than | { "gt": 0.99 } | | lt | Less than | { "lt": 10000 } | | gte | Greater than or equal | { "gte": 4 } | | lte | Less than or equal | { "lte": 8 } | | in | Value is in a list | { "in": ["RTX_3090", "RTX_4090"] } | | notin | Value is not in a list | { "notin": ["TW", "SE"] } | CLI Usage: vastai search offers 'reliability > 0.99 num_gpus>=4' --order=dph_total
